content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Jurisdiction-specific rules (anti-indemnity, retainage, prompt payment, prevailing wage) are not addressed or checked anywhere in the NDA, despite being required by the checklist.", "fix": "Add a brief clause or statement confirming that jurisdiction-specific rules for Washington have been considered and that the agreement is intended to comply with them."}, {"problem": "Flow-down obligations for subcontractor agreements are not mentioned or verified, as required by the checklist.", "fix": "Add a sentence confirming that to the extent Representatives include subcontractors or similar third parties, applicable confidentiality obligations are flowed down to them."}, {"problem": "NNN maintenance matrix and structural repair allocation are not addressed, though the checklist requires them to be populated/checked.", "fix": "Insert a short statement that NNN maintenance and structural repair responsibilities are not applicable to this NDA or are intentionally left unaddressed."}, {"problem": "Ratification clause for amendments and subleases, required by the checklist, is missing.", "fix": "Add a ratification clause stating that any amendments, subleases, or related agreements will ratify and reaffirm the NDA’s terms unless expressly stated otherwise."}, {"problem": "ADS fixed defaults and Pakistan labour law compliance table, required by the checklist (even if not applicable), are not mentioned.", "fix": "Add a note that ADS fixed defaults and Pakistan labour law compliance are not applicable to this NDA or confirm that they have been considered and are not triggered."}, {"problem": "Attorney-review disclaimer is included, but the checklist requires it \"at the top of output\" and it currently appears near the end of the agreement.", "fix": "Move or duplicate the attorney-review disclaimer to the very beginning of the document, before the NDA title."}]}
